Description: Weather agent with Lambda - add action group manually in console

Properties.Instruction:
You are a helpful weather assistant. You can provide weather information for any location.
      When asked about weather, use the get-weather action to retrieve current conditions.

AgentId.Description: Agent ID - use this to add action group in console

LambdaArn.Description: Lambda ARN - use this when adding action group

ManualSteps.Value: Go to AWS Console > Bedrock > Agents > Select agent > Add action group

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
